sentences.arabic: وَجَدَ سَامِرٌ طَعَامًا مُتَبَقِّيًا مِنَ الْأَمْسِ.
sentences.translation: Samir je pronašao ostatke hrane od jučer.
sentences.translationEn: Samir found leftover food from yesterday.

sentences.translation: Zagriao ga je u mikrovalnoj i pojeo.
sentences.translationEn: He heated it in the microwave and ate it.

sentences.translation: Hrana je i dalje bila ukusna.

sentences.arabic: قَرَّرَ أَنْ يَطْبُخَ أَكْثَرَ فِي الْمَرَّةِ الْقَادِمَةِ.
sentences.translation: Odlučio je sljedeći put kuhati više.
sentences.translationEn: He decided to cook more next time.
